steps.title: Total customers
steps.content: The table’s bottom‑right corner shows the total number of customers as 135.

steps.title: Customers at least 40 years old
steps.content: The row for customers aged 40 or older shows a total of 105 customers. Probability is favorable outcomes divided by total outcomes, so the probability is $$\frac{105}{135}.$$ This matches $\frac{105}{135}$, so D is correct.
